title: Malik's Colorful Snacks
synopsis: Baby Malik discovers different colored foods at snack time, exploring red strawberries, yellow bananas, orange carrots, green peas, and purple grapes through joyful sensory play.

pages.text: Malik loves snack time! Look at all the pretty colors on his plate.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes sits in a high chair with a colorful plate of mixed fruits and vegetables, rainbow paint splatters frame the scene with joyful finger paint aesthetic
illustration.alt: Malik sitting at snack time with colorful food

pages.text: Red strawberries! Malik picks up the red berry. So sweet and juicy!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holds a bright red strawberry, dominant red paint splashes and drips surround him in splashy painterly style

pages.text: Yellow banana! Malik peels the yellow fruit. Yummy and soft!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes peeling a bright yellow banana, dominant yellow paint splatters and sensory visual drips create joyful pure color background

pages.text: Orange carrots! Malik crunches the orange sticks. Crispy and fun!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes munching orange carrot sticks, dominant orange paint splatter drips in finger paint aesthetic with color exploration theme

pages.text: Green peas! Malik pops the green balls in his mouth. Round and tasty!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes eating bright green peas, dominant green paint splatters drip around him in sensory visual joyful pure color style

pages.text: Purple grapes! Malik squishes the purple fruit. Sweet and juicy! All done!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes with purple grape juice on his fingers and face, dominant purple paint splashes in splashy painterly finger paint aesthetic
illustration.alt: Malik eating purple grapes with messy hands

metadata.illustrationStyle: rainbow colors, splashy painterly, one color dominant per scene, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic, color exploration

questions.question: What color is the strawberry Malik eats?
questions.explanation: The strawberry is red! Red is a bright, pretty color.

questions.question: What yellow fruit does Malik peel?
questions.explanation: Malik peels a yellow banana! Bananas are soft and yummy.

questions.question: What color are the peas Malik eats?
questions.explanation: The peas are green! Green peas are round and tasty.
